privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic environment task. The Nx Witness VMS is real software (v5.1.5.39242 or v6.0.1.39873) running at https://localhost:7001 with self-signed SSL certificate. Data is synthetic: system name is 'GymAnythingVMS', 3 virtual cameras are created via testcamera with synthetic RTSP streams, and 5 synthetic users are created via API (security.operator, camera.admin, site.manager, john.smith, sarah.jones) plus built-in admin user. The task queries real Nx Witness REST API endpoints (/rest/v1/system/info, /rest/v1/devices, /rest/v1/users, /rest/v1/servers, /rest/v1/storages, /rest/v1/system/settings) using Bearer token authentication (admin/Admin1234!) and must compile results into a JSON report at /home/ga/reports/system_health_report.json with required keys: report_metadata, server_info, cameras, users, storage, system_settings. Verifier expects 70+ points out of 100 to pass.
